center.name: 约瑟夫·哈维·赖利
center.summary: 约瑟夫·哈维·赖利是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括鳳頭鴨、Grenada flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Grenada flycatcher (Myiarchus nugator) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Grenada and Saint Vincent and the Grenadines.Clements, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crested duck or South American crested duckBurridge, John T
